composition: ModelDrivenPlanPatchVerifyRunner proposes a knowledge proposal + records experience
IsolatedPatchRunner applies in an isolated worktree with build/test gates and rollback
KnowledgeProposal / GrowthProposal are emitted with Approved=false (human approval required)
honest: LearningLoop was NOT built as a standalone project this sprint. Its flow is COMPOSED from pieces that already exist: the model-driven runner proposes knowledge and records experience, and approval discipline holds. The loop is a safe, validated CORE, not an unattended autonomous agent, and it is tested with a FAKE planner rather than a live model.
